title: Banana Gun - Rekt
relevance_summary: Telegram oracle manipulation leading to manual ETH transfer from user wallets

prevention.rule: Block any tx that manually transfers ETH from user wallets after a suspicious oracle update

red_flags: Manual ETH transfer from user wallets
monitoring_rules: BLOCK suspicious oracle updates followed by manual ETH transfers
summary: The Banana Gun Telegram bot was exploited through a novel vulnerability in the Telegram message oracle, allowing attackers to manually transfer ETH from user wallets. A guard could have detected and blocked such transactions by monitoring for suspicious oracle updates followed by manual ETH transfers.
